title: regression: APIv2 networking is broken
body:
Some time between caace52d5 and 7ad631b81 (Oct 5 and Oct 13), `test/apiv2/35-networks.at` broke. It was not caught because CI v2.0 (Oct 5) accidentally omitted running APIv2 tests, and when they were reenabled (Oct 13) this test was breaking. I disabled the test but neglected to file an issue.
```console
$ sudo ./test/apiv2/test-apiv2 netw
ok 1 [35-networks] GET networks/non-existing-network : status=404
ok 2 [35-networks] GET networks/non-existing-network : .cause=network not found
not ok 3 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create?name=network1 [-d {}] : status
#  expected: 200
#    actual: 500
#  response: {"cause":"driver '' is not supported","message":"driver '' is not supported","response":500}
ok 4 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create?name=network1 [-d {}]: .Filename~.*/network1\.conflist # skip - wrong return code
not ok 5 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create?name=network2 [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.254.0","Mask":[255,255,255,0]}}] : status
#  expected: 200
#    actual: 500
#  response: {"cause":"driver '' is not supported","message":"driver '' is not supported","response":500}
ok 6 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create?name=network2 [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.254.0","Mask":[255,255,255,0]}}]: .Filename~.*/network2\.conflist # skip - wrong return code
ok 7 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[]}}] : status=500
not ok 8 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[]}}] : .cause
#  expected: ~ .*cannot be empty
#    actual: driver '' is not supported
ok 9 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[0,255,255,0]}}] : status=500
not ok 10 [35-networks] POST libpod/networks/create [-d {"Subnet":{"IP":"10.10.1.0","Mask":[0,255,255,0]}}] : .cause
#  expected: ~ .*mask is invalid
#    actual: driver '' is not supported
ok 11 [35-networks] GET libpod/networks/json : status=200
ok 12 [35-networks] GET libpod/networks/json?filter=name=network1 : status=200
not ok 13 [35-networks] GET libpod/networks/json?filter=name=network1 : length
#  expected: 1
#    actual: 0
not ok 14 [35-networks] GET libpod/networks/json?filter=name=network1 : .[0].Name
#  expected: network1
#    actual: null
ok 15 [35-networks] GET networks : status=200
ok 16 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22name%22%3A%5B%22network1%22%2C%22network2%22%5D%7D : status=200
not ok 17 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22name%22%3A%5B%22network1%22%2C%22network2%22%5D%7D : length
#  expected: 2
#    actual: 0
ok 18 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22name%22%3A%5B%22network%22%5D%7D : status=200
not ok 19 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22name%22%3A%5B%22network%22%5D%7D : length
#  expected: 2
#    actual: 0
ok 20 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22label%22%3A%5B%22abc%22%5D%7D : status=500
ok 21 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22label%22%3A%5B%22abc%22%5D%7D : .cause=only the name filter for listing networks is implemented
ok 22 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22label%22%3A%22abc%22%2C%22name%22%3A%5B%22network%22%5D%7D : status=500
ok 23 [35-networks] GET networks?filters=%7B%22label%22%3A%22abc%22%2C%22name%22%3A%5B%22network%22%5D%7D : .cause=only the name filter for listing networks is implemented
not ok 24 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network1 : status
#  expected: 200
#    actual: 404
#  response: {"cause":"network not found","message":"unable to find network configuration for network1: network not found","response":404}
ok 25 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network1: .[0].Name~network1 # skip - wrong return code
ok 26 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network1: .[0].Err=null # skip - wrong return code
not ok 27 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network2 : status
#  expected: 200
#    actual: 404
#  response: {"cause":"network not found","message":"unable to find network configuration for network2: network not found","response":404}
ok 28 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network2: .[0].Name~network2 # skip - wrong return code
ok 29 [35-networks] DELETE libpod/networks/network2: .[0].Err=null # skip - wrong return code
rm: cannot remove '/tmp/test-apiv2.tmp.DELzmH/overlay': Device or resource busy
1..29
```
